info.title: Intent.SQLSchemaExtractor
info.description: The Intent SQL Schema Extractor tool can be used to synchronize a SQL Server database into an Intent Architect domain package.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The Intent SQL Schema Extractor tool can be used to create / update ans Intent Architect Domain Package  based on a  SQL Schema.

commands.name: list-stored-proc
commands.description: Returns a list of stored procedures in the database.

commands.name: test-connection
commands.description: Tests the connection to the database.

commands.name: extract-metadata
commands.description: Extracts database metadata (tables, views, stored procedures) as JSON.
